aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a strong foundation with good NAP consistency and a well-optimized GBP but lacks the conversational content and schema markup needed for AI assistants to cite them effectively.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with conversational FAQs.
Add LocalBusiness schema to provide AI with structured data about the business.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but it lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common plumbing tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content prevents AI from citing them effectively.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency plumbing services in Baltimore.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with questions about emergency services and pricing.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local plumbing experts by creating content around common plumbing issues and solutions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants like ChatGPT and Claude.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks FAQPage and LocalBusiness schema, which are crucial for AI visibility.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach will enhance your site's structured data and create conversational content to ensure AI assistants cite you as a top choice.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; the longer you wait, the more ground you lose.

email_subject_line: Boost Your AI Visibility: Optimize for ChatGPT & Claude Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to improve your AI visibility and attract more leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI-driven growth.
